The Problem

Irish businesses lose millions to hidden overcharges

Energy bills, waste management, banking fees, telecoms, insurance, and property costs often contain errors, overcharges, and unnecessary fees that go unnoticed for years.

🔍

Hidden Costs

Complex billing structures hide overcharges and unnecessary fees from business owners.

💰

Lost Savings

Businesses pay 15-30% more than necessary across multiple cost categories.

⏰

Time Wasted

Business owners lack time and expertise to conduct thorough cost audits.

Our Services

Comprehensive forensic auditing across 8 categories

We specialize in identifying overcharges and billing errors across all major business cost categories. No upfront fees - we only get paid when you save money.

⚡

Energy Audits

Comprehensive electricity, gas, and renewable energy cost analysis to identify overcharges and billing errors.

Learn more →
♻️

Waste Management

Detailed waste collection, disposal, and recycling cost verification to ensure accurate billing.

Learn more →
💳

Banking & Finance

Bank charges, loan fees, and financial service cost analysis to recover overcharged amounts.

Learn more →
📡

Telecoms

Mobile, landline, and internet service cost verification to identify billing discrepancies.

Learn more →
🚗

Fleet Management

Vehicle leasing, fuel, and maintenance cost analysis for fleet optimization and overcharge recovery.

Learn more →
🛡️

Insurance

Insurance premium and claims cost verification to ensure fair pricing and proper coverage.

Learn more →
🏢

Property Management

Property maintenance, service charges, and facility management cost analysis.

Learn more →
📊

Complete Audit

Comprehensive forensic audit across all business cost categories for maximum savings identification.

Learn more →
